---
title: "qc_report_template"
output: html_document
params:
  data: !r NULL
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(NanoQuRe)
library(knitr)
```


# Quality Control results:


```{r, echo=FALSE}
shorter_seqsum(params$data)

```



```{r, echo=FALSE}
table1 <- NanoQuRe::sequencing_stats(params$data)
knitr::kable(table1)

```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
table2 <- quality_stats(params$data)
knitr::kable(table2)
```


```{r, echo=FALSE}
plot_read_lengths(params$data)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
plot_quality_distribution(params$data)
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
plot_cumulative_yield(params$data)
```
